hash_method: node:crypto sha256 over raw file bytes, computed in-worktree (feat/market-index-foundation) to avoid a cross-worktree line-ending (CRLF/LF) discrepancy noted below
cross_worktree_hash_note: The release worktree (release/market-index-foundation-prod-activation) checks these same git-tracked files out with CRLF line endings, while this implementation worktree checks them out with LF, despite both being at the identical commit e9f4d7a. This is a Windows core.autocrlf checkout-time artifact, not a content difference -- confirmed via 'git diff HEAD' on all 5 files returning zero changes. All hashes in this manifest are computed consistently within a single worktree to avoid conflating that artifact with an actual content change.
